news.title: ExxonMobil (XOM) Faces Fresh Oil Risk After Strait Of Hormuz Closure
news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil transit chokepoint, has been closed indefinitely. This closure directly affects physical oil supply routes and raises near term risks for producers. NYSE:XOM, as a large integrated oil and gas company, faces both operational challenges and potential pricing tailwinds from this disruption. For ExxonMobil, the closure of the Strait of Hormuz puts fresh attention on how its upstream, downstream and trading activities are exposed to physical supply...

news.title: $19 billion AI deal, ETF inflows return, and Binance.US plots a comeback
news.summary: AI is reshaping the crypto industry in more ways than one. On this episode of Public Keys hosted by Jennifer Sanasie, TeraWulf CEO Paul Prager explains the company's $19 billion, 20-year AI infrastructure deal with Anthropic and why Bitcoin mining is no longer its core business. Franklin Crypto CIO Seth Ginns discusses why crypto fundamentals are stronger than prices suggest, while Binance.US CEO Stephen Gregory outlines the exchange's comeback strategy.
